texto: He wasn't into one-night stands, he wasn't into scoring just to see if he could, he wasn't into acting just charming enough to get what he wanted before cutting loose in favor of someone new and attractive. He just wasn't like that. He would never be like that. When he met a girl, the first question he asked himself wasn't whether she was good for a few dates; it was whether she was the kind of girl he could imagine spending time with in the long haul.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Nicolas Sparks: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “He wasn't into one-night stands, he wasn't into scoring just to see if he could, he wasn't into a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, the-last-song, will pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

When he met a girl, the first question he asked himself wasn't whether she was good for a few dates; it was whether she was the kind of girl he could imagine spending time with in the long haul.
